description: Play Fieldstone free online. A Tetris-like kingdom builder! Place terrain tiles, harvest resources, build your army, and defend against waves of enemies.
keywords: puzzle game, strategy game, tetris-like, kingdom builder, free game, browser game
tips: Complete full rows early to build up resources before enemies arrive
Place defensive terrain near the edges where enemies approach
Don't leave gaps in rows — incomplete rows waste valuable board space
Balance resource harvesting with army building as waves get harder
Preview the next piece and plan placement two moves ahead
howToPlay: Place terrain tiles on the board like Tetris. Complete full rows to harvest resources. Use resources to build armies and defenses. Enemies attack in waves — survive by balancing puzzle-solving with kingdom defense.
aboutGame: Fieldstone is an original genre-mashup that combines Tetris-style block placement with kingdom builder strategy. Place terrain pieces on the board, complete rows to harvest resources, build armies, and defend your realm against enemy waves. The unique blend of puzzle and strategy creates gameplay unlike anything else in the browser gaming space.

faq.a: Yes. Fieldstone is completely free on Weekly Arcade with no ads, no downloads, and no account required.

faq.q: What kind of game is Fieldstone?
faq.a: Fieldstone combines Tetris-style block placement with kingdom building strategy. Place terrain tiles, harvest completed rows for resources, and use those resources to build armies and defenses against enemy waves.
The block-placement mechanic is inspired by Tetris, but Fieldstone adds resource harvesting, army building, and tower defense elements. It's a unique genre mashup you won't find elsewhere.
